ODBAA-ARS-ADMINS-GROUP.name: odbaa-recovery-service-administrators
ODBAA-ARS-ADMINS-GROUP.description: Administrators for Oracle Database@Azure Autonomous Recovery Service resources.

ODBAA-ARS-SERVICE-POLICY.name: odbaa-recovery-service-azure-policy
ODBAA-ARS-SERVICE-POLICY.description: Permissions required for Oracle Database@Azure databases to use Autonomous Recovery Service.
statements: allow service database to manage recovery-service-family in tenancy
allow service database to manage tagnamespace in tenancy
allow service rcs to manage recovery-service-family in tenancy
allow service rcs to manage virtual-network-family in tenancy
allow service database to use organizations-assigned-subscription in tenancy where target.subscription.serviceName = 'ORACLEDBATAZURE'
allow group odbaa-recovery-service-administrators to manage recovery-service-family in tenancy

ODBAA-ARS-NETWORK-POLICY.name: odbaa-recovery-service-network-policy
ODBAA-ARS-NETWORK-POLICY.description: Network permissions required to prepare OD@Azure shadow VCN resources for Autonomous Recovery Service.
statements: allow group odbaa-recovery-service-administrators to use vcns in compartment CMP-ODBAA-NETWORK-KEY
allow group odbaa-recovery-service-administrators to use subnets in compartment CMP-ODBAA-NETWORK-KEY
allow group odbaa-recovery-service-administrators to manage private-ips in compartment CMP-ODBAA-NETWORK-KEY
allow group odbaa-recovery-service-administrators to manage vnics in compartment CMP-ODBAA-NETWORK-KEY
allow group odbaa-recovery-service-administrators to manage vnics in compartment CMP-ODBAA-DATABASE-KEY
allow group odbaa-network-administrators to manage virtual-network-family in compartment CMP-ODBAA-NETWORK-KEY
